mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wms_location WHERE id = #{locationId} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_location SET location_code = #{location.locationCode}, location_name = #{location.locationName}, location_type = #{location.locationType}, region_code = #{location.regionCode}, shelf_code = #{location.shelfCode}, slot_code = #{location.slotCode}, warehouse_id = #{location.warehouseId}, capacity = #{location.capacity}, capacity_unit = #{location.capacityUnit}, used_capacity = #{location.usedCapacity}, temperature_min = #{location.temperatureMin}, temperature_max = #{location.temperatureMax}, humidity_min = #{location.humidityMin}, humidity_max = #{location.humidityMax}, sensor_device_id = #{location.sensorDeviceId}, material_types = #{location.materialTypes}, status = #{location.status}, remark = #{location.remark}, updated_by = #{location.updatedBy}, updated_at = #{location.updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{location.id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE wms_location SET used_capacity = #{usedCapacity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{locationId} AND deleted = 0
